name: Cheeseburger Pizza
recipeIngredient: Diced tomatoes (from an 8 oz can, drained and chopped)
Dill pickle chips for garnish, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat biscuits into a 12-inch round greased baking sheet or pizza pan. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, cook and stir beef and onion in a skillet until beef is browned and onion is tender. Drain off fat.
3. Stir in soup, mustard, and hot pepper sauce. Heat through.
4. Spread beef mixture over biscuits to within 1/2 inch of the edge.
5. Top with remaining ingredients.
6. Bake for an additional 5 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown.
7. Garnish with sliced pitted ripe olives and dill pickle chips, if desired.
8. Cut into wedges and serve. Makes 6 servings.
